commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the iMessage self-chat cache to match reflected self-chat rows with same normalized text and scope when `created_at` differs by less than one second, with focused cache and inbound-decision regression tests.

PR surface: Source +54, Tests +109. Total +163 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main includes exact `createdAt` in the self-chat cache key, so a +239 ms reflected row uses a different key and falls through. I did not run tests or the watcher because this review is read-only.
